tasks.name: NASP0 slice (code)
tasks.description: Implement NASP0 production changes for in-world manager detection and support gating.
acceptance_criteria: Production code implements the NASP0 acceptance-criteria set for in-world manager detection and support gating.
Host-state routing remains excluded, and formatter/lint gates pass.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/add-non-apt-system-package-provisioning-support && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, NASP0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/add-non-apt-system-package-provisioning-support" SLICE_ID="NASP0"
end_checklist: Record a targeted baseline command before edits and rerun it after edits
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="NASP0-code"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: NASP0 slice (test)

Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: Feature cleanup (worktrees + branches)
tasks.description: Close out the feature after all slices and checkpoints are complete.
acceptance_criteria: All tasks are completed and merged as intended.
Feature planning surfaces are consistent and ready for promotion or execution review.
All retained worktrees are removed.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/add-non-apt-system-package-provisioning-support && git pull --ff-only
Confirm all tasks are completed and merged as intended
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/add-non-apt-system-package-provisioning-support" DRY_RUN=1 REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Then run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/add-non-apt-system-package-provisioning-support" REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Set status to completed; add END entry with script summary; commit docs
